title: Bic Orange Fine Ballpoint Pens, Fine Point (0.8 mm), Blank Ink, Box of 20 - Writing Pens with Long-Lasting Ink, Black
features: Lightweight, Orange, hexagonal barrel provides comfortable and controlled writing and the durable tungsten carbide ball ensures consistent skip and blob free writing.
description: From the manufacturer The BIC Orange Original ballpoint pens offers you quality and reliability with a design that is hard to lose track of, making them a good choice for a busy office environment. To save you time and to add a sophisticated touch to these essential pens, the cap and end plug match the colour of the ink so you can easily find the one you need. Each pen also offers strong writing performance with a 3,500 m writing length on average*. (*SGS test 2013/2014 - average writing length for blue and black cartridges.)
